channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
## What's New

### 🗂️ Agents Management in Settings
- **New Agents tab** in Settings (⌘,) for managing agent bindings
- **Remove agents locally** from ClawDeck without touching the gateway configuration — the agent keeps running, other clients still see it
- Agent list shows avatar, display name, gateway info, and connection status
- Confirmation dialog clearly explains the removal is local-only
- Auto-switches to the next agent if the active one is removed
- Re-add agents anytime from the sidebar rail "+" button
- Cannot remove the last remaining agent (safety guard)

### Notes
- The existing "Delete Agent" in Agent Settings (gear icon) still removes agents from the gateway — use that when you want to fully decommission an agent
- This release also includes setup code pairing from v1.3.1

---
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.3.1...v1.4.0
